name_cn:
Genuine quality
Soft16 Small Size, All Eyes on You. If you felt the Large size was too big, this size is definitely a must-have. The Small size is more everyday, seemingly simple but very durable, low-key and stylish~ Lightweight, soft and comfortable leather, structured and three-dimensional, a must-have for autumn and winter!
Size: 32.5×23×14
Model: 195543 Plain Brown
